name: Regional Express Holdings Limited
summary: Regional Express Holdings Limited engages in the air transportation of passengers and freight. The company operates through Regular Public Transport and Charter segments. It provides aeromedical transport services; fly in/fly out charter services; airfreight charter services; and corporate jet charter services. The company also offers training programs to students and other airlines; and airline cadet pilot training for global carriers. As of September 30, 2020, it operated a fleet of 60 Saab 340 aircraft on approximately 1,500 weekly flights to 59 destinations throughout all states in Australia. The company was formerly known as Australiawide Airlines Limited and changed its name to Regional Express Holdings Limited in 2005. Regional Express Holdings Limited was founded in 1953 and is based in Mascot, Australia.
